creator: fjpavon@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tom Jones from comment #4)
Hi Tom.
This is the output 

root@claire:~ # usbconfig -d ugen1.4 dump_all_desc
ugen1.4: <Newmen Tech.,LTD 2.4G Wireless Mouse> at usbus1, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (46mA)

Thanks and kind regards
